title: Algerian Sun-Dried Tomato Fondue
description: A flavorful and nutritious vegetarian fondue made with sun-dried tomatoes and a hint of algerian spice. Perfect for a light and satisfying snack or meal.

ingredients.name: Sun-dried tomatoes
ingredients.notes: packed in oil, drained and chopped

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together sun-dried tomatoes, algerian spice blend, and flaky sea salt.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until fragrant and lightly caramelized.
Meanwhile, toast the nutty bread crumbs in a dry skillet over medium heat.
Serve the sun-dried tomato mixture with toasted bread crumbs and a side of diced fresh tomato.
Heat the vegetarian fondue mix according to package instructions and serve alongside.
